# MuleSoft Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector 1.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector 1.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector-studio.md)
- [Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Connector 1.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector/latest/microsoft-dynamics-365-business-central-connector-xml-maven.md)
